meaning: vt.再发行(影片、唱片、音像盒带等)
examples: "We're going to bring it out in 3-d as a theatrical rerelease on the 100th anniversary of the sinking of the Titanic in 2012," Mr. Cameron said.
Hadfield took a few liberties with the lyrics of the 1969 Bowie song, which became a hit upon its 1973 rerelease.
Rock Paper Shotgun (my favorite name for a game site) has a long piece on the complicated negotiations that led the rerelease.
One all-too-famliar subplot: Until a rerelease of his music in 2008, Rodriguez had never earned a cent in royalties from his studio albums' sales.
